title: German A1–B2 taxonomy backbone
note: Lightweight CEFR level + grammar-topic reference used to tag generated/imported content. The full day-by-day course wires in later (Phase 6).

levels.title: Foundations
levels.descriptor: Understands and uses familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases.

levels.title: Everyday Fluency
levels.descriptor: Communicates in simple routine tasks on familiar matters.

levels.title: Independent User
levels.descriptor: Deals with most situations while travelling; describes experiences, opinions, plans.

levels.title: Upper-Intermediate
levels.descriptor: Interacts with fluency and spontaneity; produces clear, detailed text on many subjects.

structuralSyntaxMatrix.notes: Time adverbs strictly precede location variables (TE-KA-MO-LO rule).

grammarTopics.title: sein & haben
grammarTopics.description: Present tense of the two core verbs sein and haben.

grammarTopics.title: Present tense (regular verbs)
grammarTopics.description: Regular verb conjugation and personal pronouns.

grammarTopics.title: Articles (Nominative)
grammarTopics.description: Definite/indefinite articles and noun gender in the nominative.

grammarTopics.title: Questions & word order
grammarTopics.description: W-questions, yes/no questions, verb in position 2.

grammarTopics.title: Accusative case
grammarTopics.description: Direct objects; masculine der/ein to den/einen.

grammarTopics.title: Possessive articles
grammarTopics.description: mein, dein, sein, ihr, unser, euer.

grammarTopics.title: Plurals & numbers
grammarTopics.description: Noun plural formation and cardinal numbers.

grammarTopics.title: Modal verbs
grammarTopics.description: können, müssen, wollen, möchten; infinitive at the end.

grammarTopics.title: Prepositions (basic) & es gibt
grammarTopics.description: Common time/place prepositions and es gibt.

grammarTopics.title: sein / haben / werden
grammarTopics.description: The three auxiliary/core verbs and position-2 word order.

grammarTopics.title: Dative case
grammarTopics.description: Indirect objects and static location; article changes.

grammarTopics.title: Pronouns (Akk/Dat)
grammarTopics.description: Personal pronouns in accusative and dative; dative verbs.

grammarTopics.title: Perfekt (full)
grammarTopics.description: haben/sein + participle; sein for change of location/state.

grammarTopics.title: Präteritum (sein/haben/modals)
grammarTopics.description: Simple past of core and modal verbs.

grammarTopics.title: Konjunktiv II (politeness)
grammarTopics.description: würde, könnte, hätte, wäre for polite requests.

grammarTopics.title: Adjective declension (all cases)
grammarTopics.description: Endings after definite, indefinite, and zero articles.

grammarTopics.title: Relative clauses
grammarTopics.description: Relative pronouns across cases and with prepositions.

grammarTopics.title: Temporal clauses
grammarTopics.description: als, wenn, während, bevor, nachdem, seit.

grammarTopics.title: Participles as adjectives
grammarTopics.description: Partizip I & II as attributes; extended participle constructions.

grammarTopics.title: Nominalization ↔ Verbalization
grammarTopics.description: Converting between nominal and verbal style.

grammarTopics.title: Cohesion & register
grammarTopics.description: Text cohesion, formal vs informal register, idioms.
